ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of school (e.g., district, charter) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "budget_per_student" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "school_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district */,
  "school_region" TEXT /* School region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Disability status of the student */,
  "english_language_learner" INTEGER /* Whether the student is an English language learner */,
  "free_reduced_lunch" INTEGER /* Whether the student is eligible for free or reduced lunch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score */,
  "passing_math_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "budget_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of budget allocation (e.g., teacher salaries, infrastructure) */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the category */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_budget_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("budget_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "budget_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget category */,
  "budget_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data modification) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard containing the chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., bar, line, pie) */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Data for the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
